name: Roboserver Systems Corp.
summary: RoboServer Systems Corp. develops self-serve and point-of sale technologies to the fast food and restaurant industries worldwide. Its systems are designed to work like ATM machines and self-checkout stands, allowing customers to place orders, pay, and go. It serves municipalities, utilities, restaurants, government agencies, service providers, equipment rental agencies, and other users of automated systems for payment processing, through cash, credit cards, debit cards, and gift cards; order-and-pay; and custom applications. The company, formerly known as Equity Thunder, Inc., was founded in 2000 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada. RoboServer Systems Corp. operates as a subsidiary of AmeriResource Technologies, Inc.
